channel.title: Posts on kuba86 · Scala Engineer · Blog · Tutorials · How to's
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on kuba86 · Scala Engineer · Blog · Tutorials · How to's

item.title: How to install Arch Linux on a server a step by step guide for beginner’s
item.description: This tutorial will go over step by step how to install Arch Linux on a server. We will not be installing it on a desktop environment so there will be no GUI. There is a lot to do to install and setup the system so be prepared to commit at least five hours to install and do some basic research on topics such as partitioning the drive, or which bootloader to choose.

item.title: How to use Scala Twirl template engine standalone, without Play Framework
item.description: Twirl in Scala Twirl is a type safe template engine based on Scala, and designed for Play Framework. It can also be used standalone, without Play. I will go through some information about Twirl, how to set it up, and use in a standalone Scala application. Keep in mind: Templates are compiled to a standard Scala functions. This provides type safety. When used standalone in Scala, Twirl needs to be added as an SBT plugin (sbt-twirl), not as library dependency.
